company.what_they_do: RedCentric (redcentric.site) is a recruitment and staffing agency offering professional recruitment and staffing solutions worldwide, with a stated focus on strategic hiring for long-term business growth. It is a distinct, separate entity from Redcentric PLC (redcentricplc.com), the UK-based IT managed services provider. The redcentric.site homepage is minimal and reveals no further detail about industries served, team size, or founding date.
company.raw_notes: Homepage at redcentric.site reads: 'Professional Recruitment & Staffing Solutions Worldwide · Strategic hiring for long-term business growth.' No about page, no team page, no blog, no case studies, no pricing, no social links found in search results. The site appears to be a lightweight/early-stage web presence. Domain is redcentric.site (not .com or .co.uk). Should not be confused with Redcentric PLC (LON:RCN), a well-established UK IT managed services provider headquartered in Harrogate, publicly listed on the London Stock Exchange — that is an entirely different company at redcentricplc.com.
